_comment: SPEC REFERENCE ONLY — not a machine-driven test fixture. These vectors are human-readable representations of NIST SP 800-73-4 APDU sequences for review and documentation. The actual test oracle is the hardcoded hex in test/wp11_test_piv.c, which was derived from the same spec. A JSON parser was not added to the C test suite because: (1) no JSON library is available without adding a dependency, (2) writing a custom parser in C adds ~200 LOC of parser risk with no test coverage benefit, (3) both the JSON and C hex values are manually derived from the same spec sections, so drift between them would indicate a manual error in both places simultaneously. To add a new test vector: add the hex to wp11_test_piv.c AND update this file for human reference. wolfP11-7fr decision 2026-04-07.

description: PIV SELECT AID per SP 800-73-4 Section 2.2
PIV VERIFY PIN '123456' padded to 8 bytes per SP 800-73-4 Section 3.2.1
GENERAL AUTHENTICATE with P-256 key in slot 9C
GENERAL AUTHENTICATE with RSA-2048 key in slot 9A
GET DATA for digital signature certificate in slot 9C
